'''Tannath''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Witches of Dathomir|Dathomiri Witch]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]]. She was one of the few who believed that [[Gethzerion]] should have been killed when she fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]].

{{Char-stub}}
